svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="act-safety" name="Actuator Command Safety Flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-475" dy="-110" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Actuator Command Safety Validation Flow (ASIL-B)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="10" width="600" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" value="ActuatorCommand
(from TCP)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="80" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" value="[1] Decode
Protobuf" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="80" width="100" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" value="[2] Validate
Actuator ID" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="80" width="100" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" value="[3] Check
Rate Limit
(50/sec)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="80" width="100" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" value="[4] Range
Validation
(min/max)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="610" y="80" width="100" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" value="[5] Clamp to
Safety Limits
(e.g. 95% max)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="750" y="80" width="110" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" value="[6] Write PWM
Register" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="610" y="200" width="100" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" value="[7] Readback
Verify" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="750" y="200" width="100" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" value="[8] Send
ActuatorResponse
(OK)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="750" y="310" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err_decode" value="Decode Error
FAIL-SAFE" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="200" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err_invalid" value="INVALID
ACTUATOR" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="200" width="100" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err_rate" value="RATE
LIMITED" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="200" width="100" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err_readback" value="Readback Mismatch
FAIL-SAFE" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="610" y="310" width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e01" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="input" target="s1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s1" target="s2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e23" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s2" target="s3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e34" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s3" target="s4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e45" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s4" target="s5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e56" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" parent="1" source="s5" target="s7" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="805" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="800" y="160" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5_6" style="strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" parent="1" source="s7" target="s6" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e78" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" parent="1" source="s7" target="s8" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee1" style="strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="s1" target="err_decode" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee1l" value="fail" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="ee1" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee2" style="strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="s2" target="err_invalid" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee2l" value="fail" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#d6b656;" parent="ee2" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee3" style="strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="s3" target="err_rate" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee3l" value="fail" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#d6b656;" parent="ee3" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee4" style="strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="s7" target="err_readback" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee4l" value="mismatch" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#b85450;" parent="ee4" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wr_note" value="Write then Readback
(detect register corruption)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="168" width="170" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
